mainEntity.name: What is the time limit for filing transfer pricing assessment appeal india?

acceptedAnswer.text: Income tax appeals before CIT(A)/NFAC must be filed within 30 days of the assessment order. ITAT appeals within 60 days. Late filing requires condonation with valid reasons. Contact us immediately upon receiving an adverse order — delay reduces options.

mainEntity.name: What is the fee for transfer pricing assessment appeal india?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fees depend on the complexity, disputed amount, and forum. We offer transparent pricing with no hidden charges. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a customised quote. Initial consultation and case assessment is free.

mainEntity.name: Can Virtual Auditor handle transfer pricing assessment appeal india across India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. With physical offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and the ability to appear before NFAC (faceless) and ITAT benches across India, we handle income tax matters nationwide. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA) is authorised to represent assessees before all income tax authorities.
